metadata.description: Custom Claude skills collection by poorants

plugins.name: ant-common-kit
plugins.description: General-purpose, cross-cutting tools usable in any project or context. Currently bundles engram — a networked PARA document brain (PARA management + knowledge-graph linking, MOC hubs, and integrity lint). Carries engram's capture-loop hooks.

plugins.name: ant-dev-kit
plugins.description: Software-development tooling. Bundles code-convention (extract, enforce, and evolve project code conventions), gardener (harness tier curator — grows repeated corrections UP the enforcement ladder (soft preference → CLAUDE.md rule → mechanical hook) and prunes over-engineered gates / dead rules / redundant skills back down or out; bidirectional, capture-loop sibling of code-convention), component-prototype (UI variant prototyping tournament), git-versioning (structure-based MAJOR.MINOR.PATCH computed from the git commit graph — no tags/CI/token), and repo-map (agent-friendly link-map + overview of a repo's organization, regenerable, stored in the repo). Carries gardener's capture-loop hook. Grows as more dev-focused skills are added.
